hooks.command: if [ -f .rpg/graph.json ] && command -v rpg-encoder >/dev/null 2>&1; then FILE=$(printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then rpg-encoder search "$(printf '%s' "$(basename -- "$FILE" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//')" )" --limit 3 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true; fi; fi

if [ -f .rpg/graph.json ] && printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit|git merge' 2>/dev/null; then if command -v rpg-encoder >/dev/null 2>&1; then rpg-encoder update 2>&1 | head -5 || true; fi; fi
cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace 2>&1
